templates.title: Templates
templates.desc: Manage your templates, questionnaires and recurring documents.

deals.title: Deals
deals.pageDesc: Manage your commercial proposals, quotations and payment plans.
deals.emptyDesc: You haven't created any proposals for your clients. Start building a new one now.
deals.createDialogDesc: Name this deal and assign it a client.
deals.noClientsYet: You don't have any clients yet
deals.deleteConfirmDesc: along with its brief, quotations and payment plan. This action cannot be undone.
deals.markWonDesc: This action will close the deal as Won. The brief, quotation and payment plan will be set to read-only mode. Do you want to continue?
deals.markLostDesc: You will mark this deal as Lost. You can still view it but there will be no active commercial actions. Do you want to continue?
deals.wonNoPlanWarning: No payment plan defined yet. You can still mark as Won, but consider adding milestones first.
deals.wonDesc: The deal has been marked as won. The brief, quotation and payment plan are saved as a historical record.
deals.salePhaseEnded: The sales phase is over. The project is ready to execute.
deals.collaboratorsDesc: Add connections to this deal so they can view and help edit it.
deals.noConnectionsMsg: You don't have any connections yet. Go to "My Network" to invite collaborators.

services.title: Services
services.titleDesc: Manage the catalog of services you offer to your clients.
services.emptyTitle: You don't have any services yet
services.emptyDesc: Start by adding the services you want to charge for in your quotations.
services.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this service?

clients.title: Directory
clients.titleDesc: Manage your client portfolio and their contact information.
clients.emptyTitle: You don't have any clients yet
clients.emptyDesc: Add clients to send them quotations and manage their payments.
clients.alreadyLinked: This client already has a portal account

recurrente.connectedDesc: Your keys have been configured and securely encrypted. You can enter new keys if you wish to update your connection.
recurrente.missingConfigDesc: You haven't configured your Recurrente keys. You won't be able to charge until you do.
recurrente.publicKeyHelp: Find this key in Recurrente > Developers > API Keys.
recurrente.privateKeyHelp: This key will never be shown again. If you lose it, you must generate a new one.
recurrente.saveReminder: Make sure to save your changes.
recurrente.errorMsg: An error occurred while saving keys

clientModal.notesPlaceholder: Any internal notes about this client...
clientModal.nameError: Name must have at least 2 characters

settingsLayout.title: Settings
settingsLayout.desc: Manage your business and account preferences.

network.title: My Network
network.titleDesc: Collaborate with other freelancers, agencies and clients.
network.emptyDesc: Share your invitation link to start collaborating with other workspaces.
network.inviteModalDesc: Send an invitation to a freelancer or agency to add them to your network and collaborate on shared Deals.
network.inviteExplain: Generate a unique link and QR code to share via WhatsApp, Slack or social media.
network.qrNote: Connections that scan this code or use the link will appear in your Active Connections.

projects.title: Projects
projects.titleDesc: Manage all your projects. They can originate from a won deal or be created directly.
projects.emptyDesc: You have no active projects. Create one directly or wait for a proposal to be marked as Won.
projects.createNamePlaceholder: e.g. Brand Redesign for Company XYZ
projects.createClientHint: You can assign a client now or later.
projects.createError: Could not create project. Please try again.

briefBuilder.emptyDesc: Start by adding questions or fields your client will need to fill in.
briefBuilder.questionPlaceholder: E.g. What is the main objective of the project?
briefBuilder.tooltipInput: E.g. This will help us determine delivery times.

serviceModal.descPlaceholder: Detail what is included in this service in the commercial proposal...
serviceModal.termsPlaceholder: E.g. 'Does not include typography purchase' or 'Subject to 3 rounds of changes'.

personalInfo.title: Personal Information
personalInfo.desc: Modify your personal information and user account details.
personalInfo.photoDesc: This photo is for internal identification. It will not be shown to your clients. We recommend JPG, PNG, or WebP. Max 2MB.
personalInfo.photoErrorSize: Image exceeds the 2MB limit. Please choose a smaller one.
personalInfo.photoErrorLarge: File is too large for the server.
personalInfo.formDesc: Update your name and email used to access Hi Krew.
personalInfo.emailDesc: Changing your email will alter the credentials you use to access Hi Krew.
personalInfo.footerNote: Make sure to save your changes.

security.title: Security
security.desc: Manage your password and account login security.
security.2faDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account by requiring a temporary code from your mobile phone whenever you log in.
security.valNewReq: Password must be at least 8 characters long
security.valNewRegex: Must contain uppercase, lowercase, and number or symbol
security.cardDescChange: Update the password for your Hi Krew account to keep it secure.
security.cardDescAssign: You don't have a password yet because you registered with Google. Assign one to be able to log in with your email.
security.footerNote: Use a strong password that you don't use elsewhere.
security.linkedDesc: Connect third-party accounts for faster access to your dashboard.
security.googleDesc: Log in with a single click using your Google account.

branding.title: My Workspace
branding.desc: Configure the visual identity of your business.
branding.errorUpdate: An error occurred while updating data
branding.photoErrorSize: Image exceeds the 2MB limit. Please choose a smaller one.
branding.photoErrorLarge: File is too large for the server.
branding.cardDescIdentity: Upload your business logo. We recommend a square image (JPG, PNG or WEBP) of at least 400x400px, max 2MB.
branding.cardDescDetails: Configure how your brand looks on quotations and client profiles.
branding.nameDesc: This name will appear on your quotations and payment portals.
branding.colorDesc: Main color of your buttons and links.
branding.footerNote: Make sure to save your changes.

localization.title: Language & Localization
localization.desc: Configure your language, timezone, region, and format preferences.
localization.cardDescLoc: Define the main operating country of your business.
localization.cardDescLang: Adjust language, timezone, and first day of the week.
localization.cardDescFormats: Control how dates, times, numbers, and amounts are displayed.
localization.cardDescCurrencies: Define the enabled currencies for your quotations. The default currency is used in new documents.
localization.emptyCurrencies: No currencies configured. Add at least one to use in your quotations.
localization.footerNote: Make sure to save your changes.

billing.toastProReady: Subscription activated! Your Pro plan is ready.
billing.toastCancelled: Payment cancelled. You can try again whenever you want.
billing.errPayment: Could not start the payment process
billing.confirmCancel: Are you sure? Your access will end at the end of the current period.
billing.remainingDaysPost: days in your favor for your Pro plan. It will be applied as a balance to your new charge.
billing.title: Billing and Plans
billing.desc: Manage your Hi Krew subscription and billing history.
billing.freeDesc: You are on the free plan. You have limits on quotes and clients. Upgrade your plan to automate your financial business.
billing.choosePlanDesc: Unlock the full potential of Hi Krew for your business.
billing.freeSub: To start using Hi Krew and test the platform.
billing.proSub: Ideal for freelancers looking to automate payments professionally.
billing.premiumSub: For teams or agencies. Unlimited everything and personalized experience.

taxes.name: Name
taxes.keyNoChange: The key cannot be changed once created.
taxes.title: Taxes
taxes.titleDesc: Configure taxes, your tax information, and your business preferences.
taxes.taxPrefsDesc: Control how taxes are applied to your quotes and payments.
taxes.inclusiveDesc: The prices you enter already include tax. The system will not add it separately.
taxes.taxReportingDesc: Receive a summary of your generated taxes and withholdings for the month.
taxes.taxInfoDesc: Tax identifiers of your business. They appear on your collection documents.
taxes.errSavedPrefs: Could not save preferences. Please try again.
taxes.errToggle: Could not update the tax status.
taxes.deleteError: Could not delete the tax rate. Please try again.
taxes.taxRatesDesc: Define the taxes you apply. They are calculated automatically in your quotes and payments.
taxes.addTaxesInfo: Add the taxes you apply to your clients.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.titleDesc: Connect the tools you use to charge and manage your business.
integrations.recurrenteDesc: Payment processor in Guatemala and El Salvador. Accept cards, transfers, and payment links.
integrations.driveDesc: Save and organize your project files directly in your Google Drive automatically.
integrations.apiDesc: Connect custom applications or automate workflows using our public REST API.
integrations.n8nDesc: Automate tasks and sync data using our preconfigured templates for n8n.
integrations.configRecurrenteDesc: Enter your Recurrente API credentials to enable payment processing. Your keys are saved encrypted.
integrations.configDriveDesc: Connect your Google account to automatically organize project files in your Google Drive.
integrations.driveDisconnectNote: This will revoke Hi Krew's access to your Drive. Files already uploaded will not be deleted.
integrations.driveDisconnectConfirm: Are you sure? This will revoke access but won't delete your files in Drive.
integrations.driveScopeNote: Hi Krew only accesses files and folders it creates. It cannot read anything else in your Drive.
integrations.driveNotConnectedDesc: Connect your Google account to start syncing project files.
integrations.driveFeat1: Automatically create a folder per project in your Drive
integrations.driveFeat2: Upload contracts, deliverables, and invoices directly from the project
integrations.driveFeat3: Open or share files in Drive with a single click
integrations.driveOAuthNote: You'll be redirected to Google to authorize access
integrations.driveConnectError: Could not connect Google Drive. Please try again.
integrations.driveDisconnectError: Could not disconnect. Please try again.
integrations.driveFolderDesc: All project folders will be created inside this folder in your Drive, keeping everything organized.
integrations.driveFolderError: Could not create folder. Please try again.

assets.title: Project Assets
assets.titleDesc: Briefs, files, deliverables, and project documents.
assets.briefsDesc: Briefing documents: kickoff, creative, technical, etc.
assets.briefNoTemplatesDesc: Create templates in Templates → Briefs to use them here.
assets.briefNoTemplate: This brief has no questions recorded.
assets.briefsEmptyDesc: Add a kickoff, creative, or technical brief to document project requirements.
assets.driveSectionDesc: Files synced to your project folder in Google Drive.
assets.driveNotConnectedDesc: Go to Settings → Integrations to connect Google Drive and start syncing files to this project.
assets.driveNoFolderDesc: Create a folder in your Drive to start uploading contracts, deliverables, and invoices for this project.
assets.driveFolderError: Could not create folder. Please try again.
assets.driveDeleteConfirm: Delete this file from Google Drive?
assets.driveDeleteError: Could not delete file. Please try again.
assets.driveEmptyDesc: Upload contracts, deliverables, invoices, or any relevant file.
assets.driveLoadError: Could not load files from Drive.

payments.title: Payment Plan
payments.titleDesc: Manage payment milestones and track project billing.
payments.noPlanDealHint: The payment plan is configured from the proposal (Deal).
payments.noMilestonesHint: Add milestones to structure how and when this project is charged.
payments.confirmDesc: This will update the status of the selected milestone.
payments.milestonesDesc: Split billing into deliverables: deposit, progress, final delivery, etc.

domains.title: Domains
domains.titleDesc: Connect your own custom domain to your portal.
domains.comingSoonDesc: Very soon you'll be able to connect your own custom domain so your clients see your quotes and services under your own brand (e.g. clients.yourbrand.com).

modules.title: Modules
modules.titleDesc: Adapt Hi Krew to your industry. Each module adds specialized fields, stages, and flows to your projects.
modules.proLimitReachedPrefix: You have 1 active module. Upgrade to

audiovisual.name: Audiovisual Production
audiovisual.tagline: Pre, production and post in one flow
audiovisual.description: Specialized flows and fields for video, film and content producers. Manage stages, crews and editing times.

photography.name: Photography
photography.tagline: From the brief to the final gallery
photography.description: Organize photo sessions, selections, editing, and delivery. Includes shooting fields for weddings, events, and portraits.
photography.feat1: Session types: Wedding / Event / Portrait / Studio

webdev.name: Web Development
webdev.description: Add technical fields to your projects: repos, issues, sprints, tech stack, and environments. Ideal for dev agencies and freelancers.
webdev.feat3: Issue and bug tracker per project

design.name: Design & UX/UI
design.description: Flows for graphic, product, and UX designers. Includes research, wireframe, visual design, and asset delivery stages.

marketing.name: Marketing & Content
marketing.description: Manage digital marketing campaigns, content production, and reports. Connect channels, audiences, and KPIs to each project.
marketing.feat1: Channel fields: Meta / Google / TikTok / Email

consulting.name: Consulting
consulting.description: Structure consulting presentations, reports, and deliverables. Add diagnosis, findings, and action plan fields.

brief.emptyDesc: Speed up your sales by having questionnaire formats ready to send. Go to Settings to create your first template.
brief.selectBriefDesc: Select a template for your client to fill out. You can create and edit templates from Settings.
brief.changeBriefDescCompleted: The client has already completed this brief. Changing the template will not delete the saved responses, but you will unlink the current questionnaire from this deal.
brief.changeBriefDescPending: If you change the template, the current public link for the brief will no longer be associated with this deal.
brief.completedDesc: The client has successfully filled out this questionnaire and their responses were saved.
brief.publicLinkDesc: Copy and send this secure link to your client. They can fill the Brief without needing a Krew account.
brief.noQuestionsYet: This brief has no questions yet.
brief.changeWarning: If you edit this template, changes will not automatically apply to this deal. To refresh the form, click Change and select it again.

briefTemplates.pageDesc: Create standardized questionnaires your clients must fill out when starting a new deal.
briefTemplates.emptyDesc: Speed up your sales with questionnaire formats ready for your clients to fill out.
briefTemplates.createDialogDesc: Give it a name to identify it. Then you can add all the required fields.

payment.amountPositive: Amount must be greater than zero.
payment.deleteConfirmDesc: This action will permanently delete the milestone from the payment plan.
payment.markPendingDesc: The milestone will return to Pending status.
payment.markPaidDesc: Confirm that you already received payment for this milestone. This action can be reversed.
payment.milestoneAddError: Could not add milestone. Please try again.
payment.planSaveError: An error occurred saving the plan. Please try again.
payment.autoCalcHint: 💡 Enter the % and the amount will be calculated automatically.
payment.planReady: The plan is ready to save.
payment.autoCalcHintFrom: 💡 Enter the % and the amount will be calculated automatically from {amount}.
payment.incompleteOneMilestone: There is one milestone with incomplete information. Review it before saving.
payment.incompleteMilestones: There are {count} milestones with incomplete information. Review them before saving.
payment.totalMismatch: The plan total ({plan}) does not match the quotation ({quotation}). Adjust amounts or percentages so they add up correctly.
payment.existingMismatch: The plan total ({plan}) differs from the quotation ({quotation})
payment.mismatchCovers: The plan covers {plan} but the quotation is {quotation}.

servicePicker.title: Add from Catalog
servicePicker.desc: Select a service. Its data will be copied as a snapshot to the quotation item.
